semantic.role: Protected output integrity guard for the ArchSpine system's generated artifacts. Detects unauthorized mutations to .spine/index and .spine/view directories by comparing current file hashes against a stored baseline snapshot.
responsibilities: Detect additions, changes, or deletions of files in the protected .spine/index and .spine/view output directories relative to a stored baseline.
Write a baseline snapshot (SHA-256 hashes) of all files in protected directories to .spine/protected-output-baseline.json.
Format a human-readable warning string summarizing detected mutations for CLI or other consumers.
outOfScope: Mutating or restoring any protected output files; this module only monitors and reports.
Reading or writing files outside the .spine subtree.
User-facing UI beyond the formatted warning string.
invariants: Protected directories are always [.spine/index, .spine/view] relative to rootDir.
File hashes computed via SHA-256 using Node's crypto module.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain integrity of generated outputs by providing a tamper-detection layer over critical .spine artifact directories.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Sync accumulated source changes including release gate fixes; likely refines the baseline comparison or warning formatting logic.

publicSurface.description: Interface describing the result of a protected output mutation scan: whether baseline exists, and lists of added, changed, and removed file paths.
Scans protected output directories under rootDir, compares current file hashes against stored baseline, and returns a report of any added, changed, or removed paths.
Computes SHA-256 hashes for all files in protected directories and writes a new baseline snapshot to .spine/protected-output-baseline.json.
Formats the mutation report into a human-readable warning string (or returns null if no mutations detected), showing up to 5 sample changed paths.
